zh.lifeSummary: 當Edith Forne de Greystroke於1084年出生在英國諾圖波藍德時，她的父親Forne Sigulfsson de Greystoke36歲，母親Alditha Isabel de Broyes26歲。她於1120年與Robert d'Oilly在英國奧可福爾班波瑞結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1152年在英國肯特坎特布瑞享年68歲，埋葬在英國奧可福爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edith Forne de Greystroke于1084年出生在英国諾圖波藍德时，她的父亲Forne Sigulfsson de Greystoke36岁，母亲Alditha Isabel de Broyes26岁。她于1120年与Robert d'Oilly在英国奧可福爾班波瑞结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1152年在英国肯特坎特布瑞享年68岁，埋葬在英国奧可福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Forne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Faure
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Pierre, Adrien, Eugenie, Jean-Claude, Laurent, Michel, Olivier.
(also Fauré): occupational name for a blacksmith or ironworker, from a regional form of Old French fevre (see Lefevre ). Compare Ford , Fore , and Foree .

nameMeanings.name: Edith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English female personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + gӯð ‘strife’. This was borne by a daughter ( 961–984 ) of Edgar the Peaceful. (She was named in accordance with the common Old English practice of repeating name elements within a family.) She spent her short life in a convent, and is regarded as a saint.

variants.name: Edythe
meanings: From an Old English female personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + gӯð ‘strife’. This was borne by a daughter ( 961–984 ) of Edgar the Peaceful. (She was named in accordance with the common Old English practice of repeating name elements within a family.) She spent her short life in a convent, and is regarded as a saint.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Edith Forne de Greystroke was born in 1084, in Northumberland, England, her father, Forne Sigulfsson de Greystoke, was 36 and her mother, Alditha Isabel de Broyes, was 26. She married Robert d'Oilly in 1120, in Banbury, Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1152, in Canterbury, Kent, England, at the age of 68, and was buried in Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edith Forne de Greystroke est née en 1084, à Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Forne Sigulfsson de Greystoke, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Alditha Isabel de Broyes, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Robert d'Oilly en 1120, à Banbury, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1152, à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterrée à Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

de.Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, England, Unite: Hook Norton, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Edith Forne de Greystroke 1084 in Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Forne Sigulfsson de Greystoke 36 und ihre Mutter Alditha Isabel de Broyes 26. Sie hat 1120 in Banbury, Oxfordshire, England Robert d'Oilly geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1152 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Canterbury, Kent, England und wurde in Oxfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edith Forne de Greystroke è nata il nel 1084 nel Northumberland, England, sua padre, Forne Sigulfsson de Greystoke, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Alditha Isabel de Broyes, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Robert d'Oilly nel 1120, nel Banbury, Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1152, nel Canterbury, Kent, England, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolta a Oxfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Edith Forne de Greystrokeが1084年にイギリスノースウンバーランドで生まれた時，父Forne Sigulfsson de Greystokeは36歳，母Alditha Isabel de Broyesは26歳であった。1120年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアバンブリーでRobert d'Oillyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1152年にイギリスケントカンテルブリーで68歳で死去し，イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edith Forne de Greystroke(이)가 1084년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Forne Sigulfsson de Greystoke(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alditha Isabel de Broyes(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1120년 영국 스퍼드실르 반버이에서 Robert d'Oilly(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1152년 영국 켄트 캉르버이에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edith Forne de Greystroke nasceu em 1084, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Forne Sigulfsson de Greystoke, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Alditha Isabel de Broyes, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert d'Oilly em 1120, em Banbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1152, em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, com 68 anos, e foi sepultada em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edith Forne de Greystroke родилась в 1084 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Forne Sigulfsson de Greystoke было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Alditha Isabel de Broyes, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert d'Oilly в 1120 г. в местности банбури, оксфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1152 г. в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 68 лет и была похоронена в местности оксфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edith Forne de Greystroke nació en 1084, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Forne Sigulfsson de Greystoke, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Alditha Isabel de Broyes, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Robert d'Oilly en 1120, en Banbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1152, en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultada en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.
